[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001000 3
1 11001101 5
2 11111000 5
3 10000110 3
4 11011001 5
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a
